title: Kulswamini
overview: A mythological family drama in which the main character, Kalyani, has strong faith in the Goddess Ambabai and later experiences many atrocities and difficulties in her life. Kulswamini is a film about spirituality, motherhood, and love. It's a great depiction of God's divine intervention in our everyday lives.
